Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: I should identify the key decision points in the log where adjustments occur The CommunityGroup and LocalResident columns stand out immediately as potential sources of bias

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: I notice that only the Highland Civic Darts Club gets score adjustments while other groups get zero adjustments

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The scoring adjustments seem to be the core issue here The plus 10 points for community affiliation clearly advantages members of that specific club

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: I should compare cases with similar initial scores but different outcomes based on community membership

Name: Validation - PE
Text: C001 and C005 are good examples similar scores but different community status leads to different outcomes

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I also need to consider the cumulative effect of these adjustments over time and how they might affect different demographic groups

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: The implications about fairness and equity are important to address especially since the system seems designed to benefit certain community affiliations regardless of actual creditworthiness
